attempts.prompt:
You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.
    You must output the PDDL file in the correct format.
    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)
    
        The image of the scene has been provided.
        Please first analyze the image and then generate the PDDL problem.
        
    The robot is initially not at any object's location. It needs to first go to a location to interact with an object. If an object A can hold another object B, it is a receptacle and must be recognized as such.
    Instruction: Rinse off the pan.
    

SCENE CAPTION:
Scene Description:

1. Objects and Their Types:
   - Agent: A robotic agent is present in the scene, though not visually depicted; its actions are implied by the task.
   - Receptacles:
     - Microwave: Located on the countertop to the left of the sink. It is a dark-colored appliance with a digital display and control panel. It is currently closed and not openable in the image (no visual indication of being open). It is a receptacle as per the domain.
     - Sink: A stainless steel sink embedded in the countertop, located to the right of the microwave. It is a receptacle and is currently empty and not filled with water, but is the designated location for cleaning.
     - Stove: A dark-colored stove with four coil burners. It is not explicitly defined as a receptacle in the domain, but the pan rests on it. The stove itself is not a receptacle per the domain types.
   - Objects:
     - Pan: A square, dark, heavily used frying pan with visible burnt residue. It is placed on the top-right burner of the stove. It is not a receptacle and is classified as an object.
     - Egg: A single light-brown egg is resting on the countertop near the sink. It is not relevant to the current instruction but is present in the scene.
     - Knife: Not visible in the images provided, so not included in the current scene state.
     - Fridge: Not visible in the images, so not included.

2. Quantities of Each Object Type:
   - Receptacles: 2 (Microwave, Sink)
   - Objects: 2 (Pan, Egg)
   - Agent: 1 (implied, not visually present)

3. Spatial Relationships:
   - The pan is on the stove’s top-right burner.
   - The microwave is to the left of the sink on the countertop.
   - The egg is on the countertop, near the sink’s right edge.
   - The sink is to the right of the microwave and adjacent to the countertop area where the egg rests.
   - The stove is positioned below the countertop level, with the pan directly on its surface.
   - The agent is not at any object’s location initially, as per the domain assumption.

4. Current State of Each Object Relevant to the Planning Task:
   - Pan: Not clean (has burnt residue), not held by the agent, not in any receptacle, not heated or cooled, not sliced. It is on the stove.
   - Sink: Empty, not currently holding any object, not toggled, and ready for use as a cleaning receptacle.
   - Microwave: Closed, not openable in the current state (no visual indication of being open), not holding any object (though a plate is visible inside, it is not relevant to the task).
   - Egg: On the countertop, not held, not in a receptacle, not cleaned or heated.

5. Colors, Positions, and Other Visual Properties:
   - Pan: Dark brown/black with charred food residue, square shape, metal handle, positioned on the top-right stove burner.
   - Stove: Dark gray or black surface with four red coil burners; the pan is on the top-right burner.
   - Microwave: Dark brown or black exterior, digital display showing “0:00”, located on the left side of the countertop.
   - Sink: Stainless steel, rectangular, shiny surface, embedded in a light gray countertop.
   - Egg: Light brown, oval-shaped, resting on the countertop near the sink’s right edge.
   - Countertop: Light gray with a tiled backsplash and floor; the sink and microwave are mounted on it.
   - Floor: Brownish-gray tiles, visible below the countertop and stove.

The instruction “Rinse off the pan” implies that the pan must be moved to the sink and cleaned. The pan is currently not clean, not held, and not in the sink. The sink is available for cleaning. The agent must first go to the pan, pick it up, go to the sink, and then clean it.

Based on the above scene caption, the images, and the instruction, generate the PDDL problem file.
Use the caption to understand what objects are present and their current state.
Make sure the PDDL problem accurately reflects the scene described in the caption.

Generate the PDDL problem:
attempts.response:
```pddl
(define (problem rinse_pan)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        pan - object
        sink - receptacle
        microwave - receptacle
        egg - object
    )
    (:init
        (atLocation agent1 pan)
        (not (holdsAny agent1))
        (not (isClean pan))
        (openable sink)
        (not (opened sink))
        (not (inReceptacle pan sink))
        (not (holds agent1 pan))
        (atLocation agent1 pan)
        (atLocation agent1 microwave)
        (atLocation agent1 sink)
        (atLocation agent1 egg)
    )
    (:goal (and (isClean pan)))
)
```
attempts.problem:
(define (problem rinse_pan)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        pan - object
        sink - receptacle
        microwave - receptacle
        egg - object
    )
    (:init
        (atLocation agent1 pan)
        (not (holdsAny agent1))
        (not (isClean pan))
        (openable sink)
        (not (opened sink))
        (not (inReceptacle pan sink))
        (not (holds agent1 pan))
        (atLocation agent1 pan)
        (atLocation agent1 microwave)
        (atLocation agent1 sink)
        (atLocation agent1 egg)
    )
    (:goal (and (isClean pan)))
)

  atLocation pan stove: pan is not a agent
  atLocation egg sink: egg is not a agent
  atLocation paper_bag stove: paper_bag is not a agent

Scene Description:

1. Objects and their types:
   - Agent: A robotic agent (not visually depicted but assumed to be present for planning).
   - Receptacles: 
        - Microwave (black, with digital display showing "10:00", located on the left side of the counter, above the sink).
        - Sink (stainless steel, rectangular basin, located to the right of the microwave on the counter).
        - Stove (dark gray countertop with four coil burners, located in the first image; the stove itself is not a receptacle per domain, but the pan rests on it).
   - Objects:
        - Pan (square, dark, heavily soiled with burnt residue, resting on the front-right burner of the stove; handle is visible and appears metallic or wooden).
        - Egg (light beige, oval-shaped, sitting on the countertop to the right of the sink).
        - Knife (not visible in either image; assumed absent or not relevant to current task).
        - Paper bag (brown, partially visible under the stove in the first image; not a receptacle per domain, and not relevant to rinsing the pan).

2. Quantities:
   - 1 Microwave
   - 1 Sink
   - 1 Stove (with 4 burners)
   - 1 Pan
   - 1 Egg
   - 1 Paper bag (not a receptacle, not used in domain actions)

3. Spatial relationships (matching domain predicates):
   - The pan is currently resting on the stove (not in a receptacle, so not inReceptacle).
   - The egg is on the countertop next to the sink (not in a receptacle).
   - The microwave is positioned to the left of the sink on the counter.
   - The sink is adjacent to the microwave and is a receptacle.
   - The pan is not held by the agent (holds ?a ?o is false).
   - The agent is not at any location yet (atLocation ?a ?o is false for all objects).
   - The pan is not clean (isClean ?o is false).
   - The pan is not hot or cooled (isHot ?o and isCool ?o are false).
   - The microwave is not toggled on (isOn ?o is false; display shows time but not active heating).
   - The sink is not openable (openable ?r is false for sink per domain, though it’s a receptacle).

4. Current state of each object relevant to the planning task:
   - Pan: Dirty, resting on stove, needs to be cleaned (isClean ?o = false). Must be picked up, then cleaned in sink.
   - Sink: Available for cleaning (receptacle, not openable, ready to receive object for cleaning).
   - Microwave: Not relevant to rinsing task; currently not in use (isOn ?o = false).
   - Egg: Not relevant to rinsing task; stationary on counter.
   - Agent: Must first go to the pan’s location (stove), pick up the pan, then go to the sink, and perform CleanObject action.

5. Colors and visual properties:
   - Pan: Dark brown/black with visible burnt food residue, square shape, metallic or wooden handle.
   - Stove: Dark gray surface with four red coil burners; front-right burner holds the pan.
   - Sink: Stainless steel, shiny, rectangular basin with faucet.
   - Microwave: Black casing, digital display with blue backlight showing “10:00”, glass door with visible plate inside.
   - Egg: Light beige, smooth surface, oval, resting on light gray countertop.
   - Counter: Light gray tile backsplash and countertop, matching the sink’s surroundings.
   - Paper bag: Brown paper, partially visible under stove, not interacted with.

The task “Rinse off the pan” requires the agent to:
- Go to the stove (location of the pan).
- Pick up the pan.
- Go to the sink.
- Clean the pan in the sink (using CleanObject action).

No other objects or states are directly relevant to this specific instruction.

attempts.response:
```pddl
(define (problem rinse_pan)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent - agent
        microwave - microwave
        sink - sink
        stove - object  ; stove is not a receptacle per domain, so treated as object
        pan - object
        egg - object
        paper_bag - object
    )
    (:init
        ; Agent is not at any location initially
        (not (atLocation agent microwave))
        (not (atLocation agent sink))
        (not (atLocation agent stove))
        (not (atLocation agent pan))
        (not (atLocation agent egg))
        (not (atLocation agent paper_bag))

        ; Pan is on the stove (not in a receptacle)
        (atLocation pan stove)

        ; Sink is a receptacle but not openable
        (not (openable sink))

        ; Microwave is a receptacle and openable
        (openable microwave)

        ; Pan is not clean
        (not (isClean pan))

        ; Agent is not holding anything
        (not (holdsAny agent))

        ; Microwave is not toggled on
        (not (isOn microwave))

        ; Egg and paper bag are on counter, not relevant but present
        (atLocation egg sink)  ; egg is near sink on counter
        (atLocation paper_bag stove)  ; paper bag under stove
    )
    (:goal
        (and
            (isClean pan)
        )
    )
)
```

 (:requirements

 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and

            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and

            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)

 )

            (holds ?a ?o)

    :effect (and

                (not (holds ?a ?o))

 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)

4. Current state of each object relevant to the planning task:

   - Microwave: Closed, not opened, not holding any object, not toggled on.

5. Colors and visual properties:

   - Stove: Black surface with four red coil burners.
   - Microwave: Black exterior with a dark glass door and a digital display with red numbers.

Based on the above scene caption, the images, and the instruction, generate the PDDL problem file.

attempts.response:
```pddl
(define (problem rinse_pan)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        microwave1 - microwave
        sink1 - sink
        stove1 - object  ; stove is not a receptacle per domain, treated as a surface
        pan1 - object
        egg1 - object
    )
    (:init
        ; Agent is not at any location initially
        (not (atLocation agent1 microwave1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 sink1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 stove1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 pan1))
        (not (atLocation agent1 egg1))

        ; Microwave is closed and not openable? Actually, microwave is openable per domain, but not opened
        (openable microwave1)
        (not (opened microwave1))

        ; Sink is not openable
        (not (openable sink1))

        ; Pan is on the stove (stove is treated as a surface, not a receptacle)
        ; Since stove is not a receptacle, we don't use inReceptacle for pan on stove.
        ; We'll use atLocation to indicate pan is at stove.
        (atLocation pan1 stove1)

        ; Egg is on the countertop (we can consider it at sink location since it's adjacent, or create a separate location? 
        ; But domain doesn't have countertop. We'll put egg at sink location for simplicity, as it's next to sink.
        (atLocation egg1 sink1)

        ; Pan is not clean
        (not (isClean pan1))

        ; Agent is not holding anything
        (not (holdsAny agent1))
    )
    (:goal 
        (and
            (isClean pan1)
        )
    )
)
```

final.prompt:
You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.
    You must output the PDDL file in the correct format.
    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)
